query: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `worker_sessions` (`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL, `workerId` int NOT NULL, `deviceToken` varchar(256) NOT NULL, `deviceName` varchar(128), `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()), `lastUsed` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CONSTRAINT `worker_sessions_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`), CONSTRAINT `worker_sessions_deviceToken_unique` UNIQUE(`deviceToken`))
